options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -corner_sigma_multiplier
options.description: Provide scaling multiplier for corner scaling

options.name: -correlation_type
options.description: {statistical|correlated|binomial|corner} How to handle inter-layer correlation. accepted values statistical|binomial|corner

options.name: -disable_positive_slack_shift
options.description: {true|false} disable positive slack shift caused by BEOL variation.

options.name: -enable_seperate_wire_var_sigma_multiplier
options.description: {true|false} Allow seperate reporting sigma multplier for wire variations. To be used along with option -wire_var_reporting_sigma_multiplier

options.name: -rc_correlation_factor
options.description: same layer R&C correlation. accepted values ( 1 | -1 )

options.name: -reset
options.description: reset wire variation modes to default value

options.name: -use_nsigma_slew_for_timing_check
options.description: {true|false} Use Wire Var aware slews for timing check lookup( true/false )

options.name: -wire_cell_variation_correlation
options.description: {true|false} Whether to RSS or add the random-cell variation and wire variation for arrivals and slack( true/false )

options.name: -wire_var_reporting_sigma_multiplier
options.description: <double> Deterministic sigma multiplier for reporting beol variations
